text:
(skip pattern)
141 D0500B2_STF_FEEL_DOWN_FREQ_CD D0500B2_STF_FEEL_DOWN_FREQ_CD D0500B2 Staff Assessment of Resident Mood - Feel Down Frequency Code CHAR 1 The data in this column contains the staff assessment of the frequency that the resident has felt or appears to be down, depressed or hopeless. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Never or 1 day
1=2-6 days (several days)
2=7-11 days (half or more of the days)
3=12-14 days (nearly every day)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
142 D0500C1_STF_TRBL_SLEEP_CD
